title: AI Analysis column in Edits never populated (No AI on every row)
fix: nothing ever ran analysis for suggested edits — the endpoint only honored a client flag no client sent
edit submission now kicks off background Claude analysis (non-blocking; 201 returns immediately; failures logged, column stays honest)
AuditRepository.updateResourceEditAnalysis writes claudeMetadata + claudeAnalyzedAt when analysis lands

claudeService now prefers the Replit-managed Anthropic integration (AI_INTEGRATIONS_* env) with fallback to the direct key — the direct ANTHROPIC_API_KEY had no credits, which would have silently kept the column empty

evidence.liveEdit: edit 55 (github-hosted resource): claudeMetadata populated ~6s after submit — confidence 0.92, suggestedTitle/tags/keyTopics real
evidence.uiColumn: row 55 shows 92% with sparkles icon; only pre-fix edits still read No AI
evidence.domainAllowlistNote: analyzeURL enforces a trusted-domain allowlist (e.g. plyr.io rejected) — such edits keep No AI by design

teardown: probe edits (ids 53-55, __qa_test descriptions) removed at final QA teardown
